name: chat-server
description: Real-time chat server with node sync

scripts.gencert: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:4096 -keyout certs/server.key -out certs/server.crt -days 365 -nodes -subj "/CN=localhost"
scripts.postinstall: echo 'Run `npm run gencert` to generate self-signed certificate for local development (not needed on Render)'
